finding: The repository had human-readable environment bootstrap instructions and structural validators, but no deterministic secret-free packet that converts those declarations into bounded pre-dispatch evidence.

behavior: bind environment, project, required secret names, workflow references, repository identity, and commit identity into one canonical packet
fail closed when required declarations disagree
reject credential-shaped fields instead of copying or ambiguously redacting them
retain explicit does-not-prove and falsification routes

source_status.workflow_contract: .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml declares environment cloudflare-research and references CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
source_status.requirements_contract: cloudflare-static/cloudflare-environment-requirements.json declares the same environment, project, and required secret names
source_status.prior_work: cloudflare-static/CLOUDFLARE_ENVIRONMENT_BOOTSTRAP.md already defines the operator procedure and epistemic boundary

cases: missing required secret reference fails closed
canonical output is deterministic across key and list ordering

uncertainty: GitHub environment existence and secret installation remain unobservable from repository declarations
Cloudflare token authorization and project ownership remain unverified
the deployment workflow has not produced a successful exact-commit proof in this run
falsification_route: generate the workflow contract JSON with validate-workflow-environment-contract.mjs
build a preflight packet and reject it unless ready_for_dispatch is true
reject any packet containing credential material or claiming deployment success
privacy_boundary: Only secret names and repository declarations are retained; secret values, credentials, personal data, private chat, and health material are excluded.
